replaces: docs/product/backlog.json is too large and may be truncated by GitHub connector
product_focus: Fastest path to working version: search movie -> find user-configured torrent/media result -> select playable video -> launch in ExoPlayer.
mvp_remaining_summary: Verify Android emulator smoke workflow after latest shell compatibility fix.
Implement search by movie title against user-configured parser/source.
Convert selected result into playable media task.
Load real metadata/files from configured service where applicable.
Open selected stream URL in ExoPlayer.
Validate on Android TV / Mi Box S or emulator.
rules: Use this compact backlog for chat-to-chat work
DONE only after acceptance criteria and QA/DoD pass
Media search/playback must rely on user-configured/legal sources only

tasks.title: Torrent/media search from movie title

tasks.remaining: Use movie title/search query to call configured parser/source, return torrent/media results, show source/quality/size/seeds when available
tasks.next: Implement first engineering feature after/alongside smoke verification
tasks.notes: Main product path. No bundled catalogs. Use user-configured sources/parsers only.
